title: Crispy Stuffed Rice Leaves
description: Delicious crispy stuffed rice leaves make for a tasty and crunchy Turkish snack. This simple recipe is perfect for a quick bite.
instructions: Wash and prepare the rice according to the package instructions.
In a separate bowl, mix the fatty, crispy, and stuffed ingredients together.
Add the rice to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Lay the leaves flat and place about 1 tablespoon of the rice mixture in the center of each leaf.
Fold the leaves to enclose the filling and place seam-side down on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with a little water and cover with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
